resources.string: WordPress User Synchronization
Creates or updates Admidio users via a JSON API from WordPress.
Note: configure a SHA-256 hash of the API token in the plugin preferences before using the endpoint in production.
Plugin enabled
Enables or disables the API endpoint.
Require HTTPS
Reject requests that are not sent via HTTPS.
Update existing users by email
If no external key is found the plugin may fall back to the email address.
Assign Admidio default roles for new users
Calls Admidio default role assignment after user creation.
Profile field for external ID
Internal Admidio profile field name, e.g. WP_USER_ID.
Fallback role
Used when no WordPress role can be mapped.
WordPress to Admidio role map (JSON)
Example: {"subscriber": "Interested parties", "member": "Members"}.
Allowed client IPs
Comma-separated list of allowed IP addresses. Empty = no restriction.
SHA-256 hash of the API token
Store the SHA-256 hash of the shared secret here, not the plaintext token.
